GM:(0,0,0)  A:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  M:(1/2,1/2,0)  R:(0,1/2,1/2)  RA:(-1/2,0,1/2)  X:(0,1/2,0)  XA:(-1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM1+  GM2+  GM1-  GM2-  GM3+GM4+  GM3-GM4-  GM5  GM6  (A)R1+  (A)R2+  (A)R1-  (A)R2-  (A)R3+R4+  (A)R3-R4-  (A)R5  (A)R6  (M)S1+  (M)S2+  (M)S1-  (M)S2-  (M)S3+S4+  (M)S3-S4-  (M)S5  (M)S6  (R)T2  (R)T1  (R)T3  (R)T4  (RA)U1  (RA)U2  (RA)U3  (RA)U4  (X)Y2  (X)Y1  (X)Y3  (X)Y4  (XA)X1  (XA)X2  (XA)X3  (XA)X4  Z1+  Z2+  Z1-  Z2-  Z3+Z4+  Z3-Z4-  Z5  Z6
